case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS PLAYER, ANDREA L.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PLAYER, ANDREA L.

PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES PETITION MAILED ON NOV 04, 1998

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,303.60 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT PLAYER, ANDREA L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
